prestazioni: Engine swap to J37A4 (3.7L V6 from Acura RL/MDX) with forged internals: CP Pistons (9.0:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Pair with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power, featuring 200-cell catalytic converters and a 76mm titanium tip for optimal scavenging.

Forced induction via Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) on a custom manifold by Full-Race Motorsports, mated to a GReddy Type-S intercooler (700x220x100mm core) and a Tomei 80mm blow-off valve. Boost controlled via AEM Tru-Boost Controller targeting 12 psi on 98 RON fuel.

Chassis reinforcement with Cusco 4-point strut tower bar (front) and Ultra Racing rear lower arm brace (RLB-11). Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for JDM-spec Elysion weight distribution) and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm, 3-position). Braking upgraded to Endless CC-RG6 rotors (356mm front, 330mm rear) with AP Racing CP8306-88 calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (RB-CV3HONDA) with custom carbon fiber fenders (25mm wider front, 35mm wider rear) and extended aluminum overfenders. Front bumper lip replaced with Seibon Carbon JDM-spec Elysion lip (part #HON-ELY-FLIP) and rear diffuser by Varis (carbon fiber, 3-piece).

Custom 22-inch Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (9.5J ET+15 front, 10.5J ET+20 rear) in Hyper Silver, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/22 front, 295/25/22 rear). Wheel spacers by 5Zigen (15mm front, 20mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment.

Interior overhaul with Bride Euroster II seats (fixed-back, carbon shell) upholstered in Alcantara (custom red stitching) and Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses. Custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, bolt-in, chromoly) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Shift knob replaced with a custom titanium piece by Buddy Club (short-throw, 400g weight).
